examples: Here they wait out the frozen months, feeding mainly on sagebrush blown clear of snow.
Fire and wind raged all around, snapping juniper trees and incinerating the sagebrush.
The bottomlands are carpeted with arid sagebrush and dotted with spring ponds.
Here in northwest Colorado, wind whips through sagebrush in this hot and dusty landscape, home to one of the ferret reintroduction sites.
